entries.name: Berserker Stance
entries.desc:
An aggressive combat state that increases the damage of your auto-attacks by 15% and reduces the duration of Fear, Sap and Incapacitate effects on you by 10%.

Lasts until canceled.

entries.name: Defensive Stance
entries.desc:
A defensive combat state that reduces all damage you take by 15% and all damage you deal by 10%.

Lasts until canceled.

entries.name: Fast Footwork
entries.desc: Movement speed increased by 5%.

entries.name: War Machine
entries.desc:
Your auto-attacks generate 10% more Rage.

Killing an enemy instantly generates 5 Rage and increases your movement speed by 30% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Thunder Clap
entries.desc:
Blasts all enemies within 8 yards for 81 Physical damage and reduces their movement speed by 20% for 10 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

If you know Rend, inflicts Rend on all targets.

entries.name: Leeching Strikes
entries.desc: Leech increased by 3%.

entries.name: Impending Victory
entries.desc:
Instantly attack the target, causing 20 damage and healing you for 30% of your maximum health.

Killing an enemy that yields experience or honor resets the cooldown of Impending Victory and makes it cost no Rage.

entries.name: Heroic Leap
entries.desc: Leap through the air toward a target location, slamming down with destructive force to deal 8 Physical damage to all enemies within 8 yards.

entries.name: Crackling Thunder
entries.desc: Thunder Clap's radius is increased by 50% and it reduces affected target's movement speed by an additional 20%.

entries.name: Storm Bolt
entries.desc: Hurls your weapon at an enemy, causing 10 Physical damage and stunning for 4 sec.

entries.name: Rend
entries.desc: Lash out with your weapon, striking all targets within 10 yds for 89 Physical damage instantly and wounding them for an additional 74 Bleed damage over 15 sec.

entries.name: Second Wind
entries.desc:
Restores 6% health every 1 sec when you have not taken damage for 5 sec.

Restores 2% health every 1 sec while you are below 35% health. The amount restored increases the closer you are to death.

entries.name: Frothing Berserker
entries.desc: Mortal Strike and Cleave have a 20% chance to immediately refund 10% of the Rage spent.

entries.name: Bounding Stride
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Heroic Leap by 15 sec and Heroic Leap also increases your movement speed by 70% for 3 sec.

entries.name: Pain and Gain
entries.desc:
When you take any damage, heal for 2.0% of your maximum health. 

This can only occur once every 10 sec.

entries.name: Intervene
entries.desc: Run at high speed toward an ally, intercepting all melee and ranged attacks against them for 6 sec while they remain within 10 yds.

entries.name: Interpose
entries.desc: Run at high speed toward a target location near your allies, taking 30% of all damage dealt to allies within 3 yards for 8 sec or until you take at least 6,110 damage from this effect.

entries.name: Shockwave
entries.desc: Sends a wave of force in a frontal cone, causing 7 damage and stunning all enemies within 10 yards for 2 sec.

entries.name: Overwhelming Rage
entries.desc: Maximum Rage increased by 30.

entries.name: Rallying Cry
entries.desc:
Lets loose a rallying cry, granting all party or raid members within 40 yards 10% temporary and maximum health for 10 sec.

Health granted increased by 50% when not in a raid.

entries.name: Field Dressing
entries.desc: Healing received increased by 3% and all self-healing increased by an additional 10%.

entries.name: Spell Reflection
entries.desc: Raise your weapon, reflecting the first spell cast on you and reducing magic damage you take by 20% for 5 sec.

entries.name: Wrecking Throw
entries.desc: Hurl your weapon at the enemy, causing 211 Physical damage, ignoring armor. Deals up to 500% increased damage to absorb shields.

entries.name: Shattering Throw
entries.desc: Hurl your weapon at the enemy,  removing any magical immunities and causing 208 Physical damage, ignoring armor. Deals up to 500% increased damage to absorb shields.

entries.name: Rumbling Earth
entries.desc: Shockwave's range increased by 6 yards and when it strikes at least 3 targets its cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

entries.name: Berserker Shout
entries.desc:
Go berserk, removing and granting immunity to Fear, Sap, and Incapacitate effects for 6 sec.

Also remove fear effects from group members within 12 yds.

entries.name: Fearless
entries.desc: Cooldown of Berserker Rage is reduced by 50% and Berseker Rage removes all movement speed-impairing effects.

entries.name: Intimidating Shout
entries.desc:
Causes the targeted enemy to cower in fear while all enemies within 8 yards flee from you and their movement speed is reduced by 70% for 8 sec.
Damage may cancel the effect.

entries.name: Piercing Howl
entries.desc:
Snares all enemies within 12 yards, reducing their movement speed by 70% for 8 sec.

Spurs all allies within 6 yards, increasing their movement speed by 30% for 4 sec.

entries.name: Honed Reflexes
entries.desc:
Cooldown of Die By the Sword, Intervene, Interpose, Spell Reflection, Storm Bolt, and Pummel reduced by 10%.

Successfully interrupting an enemy increases the damage you deal to them by 5% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Armored to the Teeth
entries.desc: Gain Strength equal to 5% of your Armor.

entries.name: Double Time
entries.desc: Charge gains 1 additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 3 sec.

entries.name: Reinforced Plates
entries.desc: Stamina increased by 5% and Armor increased by 5%.

entries.name: Barbaric Training
entries.desc: Slam, Whirlwind, and Cleave deal 10% more damage and 5% increased critical strike damage.

entries.name: Javelineer
entries.desc:
Range of your thrown abilities is increased by 5 yards.

Damage dealt by Champion's Spear, Shattering Throw, and Wrecking Throw increased by 20%.

Shattering Throw and Wrecking Throw silence non-players for 3 sec.

entries.name: Resonant Voice
entries.desc: The effects of your shouts last 20% longer.

entries.name: Crushing Force
entries.desc: Mortal Strike deals an additional 5% damage and deals 5% increased critical strike damage.

entries.name: Cruel Strikes
entries.desc: Critical strike chance increased by 1% and critical strike damage of Execute increased by 5%.

entries.name: Dual Wield Specialization
entries.desc: While dual wielding your damage is increased by 3% and movement speed is increased by 2%.

entries.name: Wild Strikes
entries.desc: Haste increased by 1% and your auto-attack critical strikes increase your auto-attack speed by 10% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Anger Management
entries.desc: Every 20 Rage you spend on attacks reduces the remaining cooldown on Avatar and Colossus Smash by 1 sec.

entries.name: Champion's Spear
entries.desc:
Throw a spear at the target location, chaining all enemies in the area to the spear's location and dealing 83 Physical damage instantly and an additional 128 Physical damage over 6 sec. 

While the spear is active, activating this ability will cause you to leap to the spear, dealing 16 Physical damage to all targets.

All damage dealt reduced beyond 5 targets.

Generates 10 Rage.

entries.name: Stance Mastery
entries.desc:
Your stances have additional effects.

 Battle Stance
Increases the critical strike damage of your abilities by 3%.

 Defensive Stance
When an attack deals 20% or more of your maximum health in damage, that damage is reduced by 15%.

entries.name: Battlefield Commander
entries.desc:
Your Shout abilities have additional effects.

 Battle Shout:
Grants you an additional 3% attack power.

 Rallying Cry:
Grants an additional 2% health and duration increased by 3 sec.

 Piercing Howl:
Radius increased by 100%

 Berserker Shout:
Radius increased by 100%.

 Intimidating Shout:
Cooldown reduced by 15 sec.

entries.name: Bloodthirst
entries.desc:
Assault the target in a bloodthirsty craze, dealing 147 Physical damage and restoring 3% of your health.

Generates 8 Rage and has a 30% chance to Enrage you.

entries.name: Raging Blow
entries.desc:
A mighty blow with both weapons that deals a total of 75 Physical damage.

Generates 12 Rage.

entries.name: Sudden Death
entries.desc: Your attacks have a chance to make your next Execute cost no Rage, be usable on any target regardless of their health, and deal damage as if you spent 40 Rage.

entries.name: Frenzied Enrage
entries.desc: Enrage increases your haste by 15% and your movement speed by 10%.

entries.name: Powerful Enrage
entries.desc: Enrage increases your mastery by 15% and your Leech by 3%.

entries.name: Improved Execute
entries.desc: Execute no longer costs Rage and now generates 20 Rage.

entries.name: Focus in Chaos
entries.desc: While Enraged, your auto-attacks can no longer miss.

entries.name: Enraged Regeneration
entries.desc: Reduces damage taken by 30% and Bloodthirst restores an additional 20% health for 8 sec. Usable while stunned or incapacitated.

entries.name: Warpaint
entries.desc: You take 10% reduced damage while Enrage is active.

entries.name: Improved Whirlwind
entries.desc:
Whirlwind causes your next 4 single-target attacks to strike up to 4 additional targets for 65% damage.

Whirlwind generates 3 Rage plus an additional 1 per target hit. Maximum 8 Rage.

If you know Rend, Whirlwind inflicts Rend on all targets.

entries.name: Massacre
entries.desc: Execute is usable on targets below 35% health and its cooldown is reduced by 1.5 sec.

entries.name: Fresh Meat
entries.desc: Bloodthirst always Enrages you the first time you strike a target and it has a 15% increased chance to trigger Enrage.

entries.name: Invigorating Fury
entries.desc: Enraged Regeneration lasts 3 sec longer and instantly heals for 10% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Rampage
entries.desc:
Unleash a series of 4 brutal strikes for a total of 105 Physical damage.

Enrages you.

entries.name: Improved Raging Blow
entries.desc: Raging Blow has 2 charges and has a 25% chance to instantly reset its own cooldown.

entries.name: Rampaging Ruin
entries.desc: While Improved Whirlwind is active Rampage instead strikes all targets in front of you for 70 Physical damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

entries.name: Deep Wounds
entries.desc:
Execute inflicts Deep Wounds on the target.

 Deep Wounds
Causes the target to suffer 50 Bleed damage over 6 sec. If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Deep Wounds.

entries.name: Spite
entries.desc: Bloodthirst and Raging Blow damage increased by 2.5% and critical strike damage increased by 2.5%.

entries.name: Scent of Blood
entries.desc: Rampage increases the damage of your next Bloodthirst by 10%, stacking up to 2 times.

entries.name: Kill or Be Killed
entries.desc:
When you would sustain fatal damage, you instead fly into an unstoppable rage, becoming unkillable and immune to movement-impairing effects for 8 sec as you seek revenge on your would-be killer.

If you kill your killer in that time, you emerge from your blind rage triumphant, with at least 20% of your max health intact. If you are not victorious, you die.

This effect can only occur once every 5 min and if your killer is alive when you sustain fatal damage.

entries.name: Hack and Slash
entries.desc: Rampage has a 100% chance to refund a charge of Raging Blow.

entries.name: Cruelty
entries.desc: While Enraged, Bloodthirst and Raging Blow deal 5% increased damage.

entries.name: Meat Cleaver
entries.desc: Whirlwind deals 50% additional damage when it hits 3 or more targets.

entries.name: Cold Steel, Hot Blood
entries.desc: Bloodthirst critical strikes generate 4 additional Rage and inflict a Gushing Wound that deals 42 Bleed damage over 6 sec and heals you for the damage dealt.

entries.name: Ragedrinker
entries.desc: Bloodthirst critical strikes restore 3% additional health and increase the damage of Raging Blow by 10% for 4 sec.

entries.name: Recklessness
entries.desc: Go berserk, increasing all Rage generation by 50% and granting your abilities 20% increased critical strike chance for 12 sec.

entries.name: Bloodcraze
entries.desc: Raging Blow increases the damage of your next Bloodthirst by 5%, stacking up to 5 times.

entries.name: Wrath and Fury
entries.desc: Raging Blow deals 15% increased damage and while Enraged, Raging Blow has a 10% increased chance to instantly reset its own cooldown.

entries.name: Deft Experience
entries.desc: Bloodthirst's critical strike chance increased by 5% and if you are Enraged, Bloodthirst extends your Enrage by 0.5 sec. This extension is doubled if Bloodthirst critically strikes your primary target.

entries.name: Frenzy
entries.desc: Rampage increases your haste by 2% for 12 sec. Multiple instances of this effect may overlap.

entries.name: Critical Thinking
entries.desc: Raging Blow's critical strike chance increased by 5% and critical strike damage increased by 5%.

entries.name: Vicious Contempt
entries.desc: Bloodthirst deals 25% increased damage to enemies who are below 35% health.

entries.name: Odyn's Fury
entries.desc:
Unleashes your power, dealing 135 Physical damage and an additional 182 Bleed damage over 4 sec to all enemies within 12 yards. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Enrages you and generates 20 Rage.

entries.name: Bloodborne
entries.desc: Bloodthirst causes your Bleeds to deal 20% additional damage for 8 sec.

entries.name: Surge of Adrenaline
entries.desc: When Raging Blow resets its own cooldown, your auto-attack damage and speed is increased by 30% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Executioner's Wrath
entries.desc: Execute generates 5 additional Rage and increases the damage of Rampage by 10% for 4 sec.

entries.name: Reckless Abandon
entries.desc:
Activating Recklessness generates 50 Rage and while Recklessness is active, Raging Blow and Bloodthirst are upgraded to Crushing Blow and Bloodbath.

 Crushing Blow
Deals increased damage and deals 20% additional critical strike damage.

 Bloodbath
Deals increased damage and wounds the target to suffer 21 Bleed damage over 6 sec. Using Bloodbath on a target affected by Bloodbath extends the bleed by 6 sec.

entries.name: Avatar
entries.desc: Transform into a colossus, increasing all damage you deal by 20% and reducing damage you take from area of effect attacks by 5% for 20 sec.

entries.name: Bladestorm
entries.desc:
Become an unstoppable storm of destructive force, striking all nearby enemies for 673 Physical damage over 5.4 sec. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects, but can use defensive abilities and can avoid attacks.

entries.name: Rampaging Berserker
entries.desc: Rampage damage increased by 10% and Rampage makes you go Berserk, increasing your Strength by 3% for 8 sec. Multiple applications of Berserk may overlap.

entries.name: Show No Mercy
entries.desc: Executioner also increases your Execute critical strike chance and critical strike damage by 3% per stack.

entries.name: Culling Cyclone
entries.desc: Each strike of Bladestorm deals an additional 20% damage evenly split across all targets.

entries.name: Brutal Finish
entries.desc: Your next Mortal Strike after Bladestorm ends deals 50% additional damage.

entries.name: Fierce Followthrough
entries.desc: Mortal Strike critical strikes increase the damage of your next Mortal Strike by 20%.

entries.name: Opportunist
entries.desc: When Overpower has its cooldown reset by Tactician, your next Overpower deals 10% additional damage and 10% additional critical damage. Stacking up to 2 times.

entries.name: Imminent Demise
entries.desc:
Every 3 Slayer's Strikes you gain Sudden Death.

Using Sudden Death accelerates your next Bladestorm, striking 1 additional time (max 3). Bladestorm's total duration is unchanged.

Sudden Death has a 100% chance to trigger Reap the Storm at 100% effectiveness.

entries.name: Relentless Pursuit
entries.desc:
Charge increases your movement speed by 70% for 3 sec.

Charge removes all movement impairing effects, this effect cannot occur more than once every 30 sec.

entries.name: Vicious Agility
entries.desc: Heroic Leap reduces the cooldown of Charge by 5 sec and Charge reduces the cooldown of Heroic Leap by 2 sec.

entries.name: Slayer's Malice
entries.desc: Overpower and Execute damage increased by 15%.

entries.name: Reap the Storm
entries.desc: When Cleave hits 3 or more targets you have a 20% chance to unleash a flurry of steel, striking all nearby enemies for 269 Physical damage and applying Overwhelmed. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Overwhelming Blades
entries.desc: Each strike of Bladestorm applies Overwhelmed to all enemies affected, increasing damage you deal to them by 1% for 20 sec, max 5 stacks.

entries.name: Death Drive
entries.desc: You heal for 15% of damage dealt by Sudden Death.

entries.name: Slayer's Dominance
entries.desc: Your attacks against your primary target have a 15% chance to overwhelm their defenses and trigger a Slayer's Strike, dealing 293 Physical damage and granting you a stack of Executioner, increasing your Execute damage by 3% for 12 sec. Multiple stacks of Executioner may overlap.

entries.name: Unrelenting Onslaught
entries.desc:
Using Sudden Death causes you to both reduce the cooldown of Bladestorm by 5 sec and apply 1 stack of Overwhelmed to your primary target per stack of Executioner you have.

You can use Pummel and Storm Bolt while Bladestorming.

Bladestorm damage increased by 20%.

entries.name: Unhinged
entries.desc: Every 2 strikes of Bladestorm, you automatically cast a Mortal Strike at your target or random nearby enemy, dealing 100% of normal damage.

entries.name: Deadly Focus
entries.desc: Executioner's duration is increased by 6 sec.

entries.name: Violent Euphoria
entries.desc: Bladestorm puts you into a battle trance, granting you 15% haste for 8 sec after you stop Bladestorming.

entries.name: Thunder Blast
entries.desc:
Shield Slam and Bloodthirst have a 35% chance to grant you Thunder Blast, stacking up to 2 charges.

Thunder Blast
Your next Thunder Clap becomes a Thunder Blast that deals 67 Stormstrike damage and generates 2 Rage.

entries.name: Gathering Clouds
entries.desc: Your attacks trigger Lightning Strikes 30% more often.

entries.name: Thorim's Might
entries.desc:
Lightning Strikes generate 3 Rage.

Raging Blow and Execute damage increased by 25%.

entries.name: Flashing Skies
entries.desc: Thunder Blast calls down a Lightning Strike on an enemy it hits.

entries.name: Snap Induction
entries.desc: Activating Recklessness grants a charge of Thunder Blast.

entries.name: Keep Your Feet on the Ground
entries.desc:
Physical damage taken reduced by 2%.

Thunder Blast reduces damage you take by 8% for 5 sec.

entries.name: Steadfast as the Peaks
entries.desc:
Stamina increased by 5%.

Victory Rush increases your maximum health by 10% for 5 sec. When this health increase expires, you heal for any amount of the original Victory Rush that healed you in excess of your full health.

entries.name: Ground Current
entries.desc: Lightning Strikes also deal 15 Nature damage to enemies near their target. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

entries.name: Lightning Strikes
entries.desc:
Damaging enemies with Thunder Clap, Raging Blow, or Execute has a 25% chance to also strike one with a lightning bolt, dealing 54 Nature damage.

Lightning Strikes occur 30% more often during Avatar.

entries.name: Avatar of the Storm
entries.desc:
Casting Avatar grants you 2 charges of Thunder Blast and resets the cooldown of Thunder Clap.

While Avatar is not active, Lightning Strikes have a 10% chance to grant you Avatar for 4 secs.

Thunder Blast
Your next Thunder Clap becomes a Thunder Blast that deals Stormstrike damage.

entries.name: Burst of Power
entries.desc: Lightning Strikes have a 15% chance to make your next 2 Bloodthirsts have no cooldown.

entries.name: Strength of the Mountain
entries.desc:
Shield Slam damage increased by 15%.

Bloodthirst and Rampage damage increased by 25%.

entries.name: Crashing Thunder
entries.desc:
Stormstrike or Nature damage your abilities deal is increased by 5%. Stormstrike damage ignores Armor.

Thunder Clap damage increased by 30%.

entries.name: Storm Bolts
entries.desc: Storm Bolt also hits 2 additional nearby targets, stunning them for 2 sec, but its cooldown is increased by 10 sec.

entries.name: Storm Shield
entries.desc: Intervening a target grants them a shield for 5 sec that absorbs magic damage equal to 3 times your Armor.

entries.name: Capacitance
entries.desc: During Avatar, Thunder Blast extends Avatar's duration by 2.0 sec.

entries.name: Conductivity
entries.desc: Lightning Strike damage increased by 10% and critical strike damage increased by 10%.

entries.name: Storm Surge
entries.desc: Avatar increases the damage of Thunder Clap by 50% and reduces its cooldown by 50%.
